memory.summary: I was planning to finish my analysis, but cohort_3 is already heading out for lunch. I'll just grab a bite with them instead.

desires: Not make cohort_3 feel left out or awkward since I'm skipping the planned lunch to focus on this 'soft' analysis.
Get this assignment done before 18:00 so I don't have to stress about it tomorrow, even though that means pushing back on my own nap schedule.

goals.description: Reply to cohort_3 explaining I'm stuck on the 'soft' analysis and need a few more minutes, then promise to join them immediately after finishing this specific section.
goals.rationale: My relationships (0.5 weight) outweigh task outcomes right now; skipping lunch caused awkwardness, so fixing that is urgent to avoid friction with my close friend group.

goals.description: Finish the assignment analysis by 17:45 so it's done before the deadline at 18:00.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon and dislike future stress, but doing this early enough means I can still take a nap later, which helps my physical stamina.
